title: chore: bump langgraph-checkpoint from 3.0.0 to 4.0.0 in /libs/partners/huggingface
body_text:
Bumps [langgraph-checkpoint](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph) from 3.0.0 to 4.0.0.
Release notes

Sourced from langgraph-checkpoint's releases.

langgraph-checkpoint==4.0.0

Changes since checkpoint==3.0.1

  • fix: flip default on base cache (#6677)
  • fix(checkpoint): InMemorySaver context managers should return self in… (#6529)
  • fix: docstring for serializer protocol (#6525)
  • chore: clean up some refs (#6487)
  • chore: add pyproject.toml links (#6364)

langgraph-checkpoint-postgres==3.0.4

Changes since checkpointpostgres==3.0.3

  • chore: Omit lock when using connection pool (#6734)
  • chore(deps): upgrade dependencies with uv lock --upgrade (#6671)
  • chore: update twitter URLs (#6683)

langgraph-checkpoint-postgres==3.0.3

Changes since checkpointpostgres==3.0.2

  • fix: flip default on base cache (#6677)
  • docs: storage nits (#6651)

langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite==3.0.3

Changes since checkpointsqlite==3.0.2

  • fix: aiosqlite's breaking change (#6699)
  • chore(deps): upgrade dependencies with uv lock --upgrade (#6671)
  • chore: update twitter URLs (#6683)

langgraph-checkpoint-postgres==3.0.2

Changes since checkpointpostgres==3.0.1

  • release(checkpoint-postgres): 3.0.1 (#6568)
  • chore: pgqs (#6567)
  • fix(checkpoint-postgres): ensure vector extension is created only if not exists (#6154)
  • fix(checkpoint-postgres): Replace f-string SQL formatting with parameterized queries in migration statements (#6328)
  • chore: add pyproject.toml links (#6364)
  • docs: add license files for checkpoint-sqlite and checkpoint-postgres (#6392)

langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite==3.0.2

Changes since checkpointsqlite==3.0.1

  • fix: flip default on base cache (#6677)
  • docs: storage nits (#6651)

checkpoint==3.0.1

Changes since checkpoint==3.0.0

  • chore: update ormsgpack minbound and add OPT_REPLACE_SURROGATES (#6395)
  • fix(checkpoint): update checkpoint interface specification in README (#6386)

... (truncated)

Commits
  • f91d79d fix: flip default on base cache (#6677)
  • cb2faa7 fix(prebuilt): support generic type arguments for ToolRuntime injection (#6509)
  • a5827c5 fix: change default recursion limit (#6676)
  • 5212369 feat(sdk-py): add end-time to crons client (#6674)
  • 7045a23 fix: add state attribute to ToolCallRequest overrides (#6668)
  • 728db10 fix: suppress unintended deprecation warning (#6669)
  • 454af21 feat(sdk-py): cron.on_run_completed support (#6662)
  • b4630d8 chore: delete docs (#6488)
  • 311465b fix: sanitize namespace for deeply nested graph jumps (#6665)
  • 8ccead9 docs: x-refs and explainer in tool node docs (#6653)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=langgraph-checkpoint&package-manager=uv&previous-version=3.0.0&new-version=4.0.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) You can disable automated security fix PRs for this repo from the [Security Alerts page](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain/network/alerts).

entities.name: Dependabot
entities.description: An automated bot that manages dependency updates for GitHub repositories.

entities.name: Langgraph-Checkpoint
entities.description: A library for managing checkpoints in LangGraph, updated from version 3.0.0 to 4.0.0.

entities.name: Langgraph
entities.description: The main project or repository that contains the Langgraph-Checkpoint library and its related components.

entities.name: Huggingface
entities.description: A partner context or directory within the project where the Langgraph-Checkpoint update is applied.

entities.name: Base Cache
entities.description: A caching mechanism within Langgraph-Checkpoint whose default behavior was modified.

entities.name: InMemorySaver
entities.description: A component within Langgraph-Checkpoint related to context managers.

entities.name: Serializer Protocol
entities.description: A protocol for serialization within Langgraph-Checkpoint, for which the docstring was fixed.

entities.name: Langgraph-Checkpoint-Postgres
entities.description: A PostgreSQL-specific checkpoint library related to Langgraph, updated to version 3.0.4.

entities.name: Connection Pool
entities.description: A feature in Langgraph-Checkpoint-Postgres where a lock is omitted.

entities.name: uv lock --upgrade
entities.description: A command used to upgrade dependencies.

entities.name: Langgraph-Checkpoint-Sqlite
entities.description: A SQLite-specific checkpoint library related to Langgraph, updated to version 3.0.3.

entities.name: aiosqlite
entities.description: A library that introduced a breaking change affecting Langgraph-Checkpoint-Sqlite.

entities.name: ORMsgpack
entities.description: A library whose minimum bound was updated in Langgraph-Checkpoint.

entities.name: OPT_REPLACE_SURROGATES
entities.description: An option added to ORMsgpack.

entities.name: Checkpoint Interface Specification
entities.description: Documentation related to the checkpoint interface in Langgraph-Checkpoint.

entities.name: ToolRuntime Injection
entities.description: A feature in Langgraph that supports generic type arguments.

entities.name: Recursion Limit
entities.description: A default setting in Langgraph that was changed.

entities.name: Crons Client
entities.description: A client component in Langgraph to which an end-time was added.

entities.name: ToolCallRequest
entities.description: An object in Langgraph where a 'state' attribute was added to overrides.

entities.name: Deprecation Warning
entities.description: An unintended warning in Langgraph that was suppressed.

entities.name: Cron.on_run_completed
entities.description: A feature in Langgraph for cron run completion support.

entities.name: Graph Jumps
entities.description: A concept in Langgraph related to deeply nested graphs, where namespace sanitization was fixed.

entities.name: Tool Node Docs
entities.description: Documentation for tool nodes in Langgraph.

entities.name: Vector Extension
entities.description: A feature in Langgraph-Checkpoint-Postgres that is ensured to be created only if it does not exist.

entities.name: Parameterized Queries
entities.description: A security feature used in Langgraph-Checkpoint-Postgres migration statements to prevent SQL injection.

entities.name: Migration Statements
entities.description: SQL statements in Langgraph-Checkpoint-Postgres that were updated to use parameterized queries.
